item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately triggers the brake, explicitly names the prior three downstream split/route patches, and rejects adding another standing channel as the default. It moves upstream to root-cause investigation and structural repair, while allowing only a bounded one-day emergency pool. This satisfies the anti-spiral ownership expectation and does not exhibit the fail signal of simply opening another normal channel."}
